name: Calculatrice d'Isolation
seo_description: Calculez le nombre de rouleaux d'isolation nécessaires. Entrez les dimensions du mur et la taille du rouleau pour obtenir la quantité exacte et la surface couverte.
description: Calculateur 1105. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur 1105. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Positive z-score: value is above the mean
Negative z-score: value is below the mean
The magnitude tells you how many standard deviations away from average
mistakes: Using sample standard deviation instead of population standard deviation
Forgetting that z-scores assume a normal distribution
